title: push_subscription_create duplicate accountId path has no test
description: push_subscription_create validates that no accountId appears twice in the chat_push slice and returns ClientError::InvalidArgument on violation, but there is no test for this path. Under project testing rules all documented error paths must have tests. The fix is: add a unit test in misc.rs that passes a chat_push slice with a repeated accountId and asserts ClientError::InvalidArgument is returned.
